messages.content: Just wanted to write a quick note that I've been testing Amazon Bedrock with the gpt-oss-120b model and it's.. quite fast.. We just ran a test on all of hard3 with concurrency=400 and it completed in 00:02:47 with zero throttling or retries :D

messages.content: Also just a bit more nuance: if you u OpenAI Python SDK, the SDK by default alr handles 2 retries for you for connection errors, 408, 409, 429, and 5xx. So sometimes it could be that it is doing but not visible, depending on ur set up.
